---
title: mertisreader
---

The MERTIS reader helps you load, inspect, and validate MERTIS data from plain Python.

## Quickstart

1. Read the [Tutorials](tutorials/index.qmd) for a short guided walkthrough.
2. Open the [API Reference](api.qmd) for the generated function and class docs.
3. Try the example notebook in [examples/read_merstis_test.ipynb](examples/read_merstis_test.ipynb).
